# Machine Learning Engineer – Generative AI (LLM, RAG, Agents) – San Diego, California | Visa + Salary Insights
...
This role at :contentReference[oaicite:0]{index=0} focuses on building next-generation Generative AI systems for production-scale environments. The position is designed for engineers with strong expertise in Large Language Models (LLMs), Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and agentic AI systems. The ideal candidate is someone who can move beyond experimentation into robust deployment, optimization, and evaluation of AI systems that integrate external knowledge sources. This is a high-impact engineering role within a core AI team, requiring both research fluency and production engineering discipline.
...
- ✅ Job Source & Verification
- 🏢 Company: Qualcomm Technologies, Inc.
- 🟢 Job Posted: May 27, 2026 (estimated based on listing recency)

explicitly stated)

...
San Diego engineering roles
...
This role centers on building scalable Generative AI systems that combine LLMs, vector databases, and RAG pipelines into production-ready architectures. Engineers are expected to design systems that improve model accuracy by integrating external knowledge sources and optimizing retrieval pipelines. A major focus is developing agent-based workflows capable of autonomous reasoning and task execution across distributed environments.
...
Approximately 30% of the role involves designing and implementing RAG architectures, ensuring semantic retrieval quality and low-latency inference. Another 25% focuses on fine-tuning LLMs using domain-specific datasets to improve performance for targeted applications. Around 20% is dedicated to building evaluation frameworks that measure hallucination reduction, retrieval precision, and response quality.
...
The remaining time involves integrating PyTorch, TensorFlow, and modern ML infrastructure tools into scalable pipelines deployed on AWS/GCP/Azure. Engineers will also collaborate with cross-functional teams to deploy models using microservices and containerized environments. Strong emphasis is placed on production reliability, observability, and continuous model improvement.
...
- ✅ Must: Python programming at production level
- ✅ Must: Experience with LLMs and Generative AI
- ✅ Must: RAG architecture design and implementation
- ➕ Bonus: LangChain, LlamaIndex, Transformers
- ➕ Bonus: Reinforcement Learning experience
...
The engineer will design and deploy LLM-based systems integrated with external knowledge sources using RAG pipelines. Responsibilities include building scalable inference services, optimizing embedding models, and improving retrieval accuracy. A core part of the role involves fine-tuning large models for domain adaptation and ensuring stable performance under production constraints.
...
The role also requires building evaluation frameworks to assess hallucination rates, response relevance, and retrieval effectiveness. Engineers will implement agentic workflows capable of autonomous decision-making across multi-step tasks. Additionally, collaboration with infrastructure teams will ensure seamless deployment on AWS, GCP, or internal cloud systems using containerized microservices architectures.
...

...

...

...
Analyze and optimize AI and Machine Learning workloads on Neural Processing Units (NPU), Neural Signal Processors (NSP), and GPUs

...

...

...
Analyze performance under concurrent, virtualized, and safety‑critical or real‑time environments.
...
Build and maintain performance benchmarking tools, profilers, regression frameworks, and micro-benchmark suites.
...
Partner with architecture, compiler, SDK, and AI framework teams to influence HW/SW design and resolve performance escalations.

results.title: Sr Director, Cloud AI Rack Architecture and System Design at Qualcomm | Jeremy
highlights:
Sr Director, Cloud AI Rack Architecture and System Design at Qualcomm | Jeremy
...
# Sr Director, Cloud AI Rack Architecture and System Design
...
Lead end-to-end rack-scale hardware architecture and system design for Qualcomm's next-generation AI inference platforms (AI200/AI250), spanning thermal, power, interconnect, and management systems across OCP-compliant solutions.
...
Qualcomm's Cloud Business Unit is building next-generation AI inference rack scale solutions, anchored by the AI200/AI250 accelerator family. We are seeking a seasoned Senior Director to lead the end-to-end hardware architecture, design, and delivery of full rack-level solutions — from OCP/Open Rack-compliant chassis, power, and thermal systems to high-speed interconnects, management infrastructure, and ODM engagement. This leader will define Qualcomm's rack-scale differentiation strategy and drive execution across cross-functional hardware and systems teams.
...
- Define and own end-to-end rack-scale architecture for Qualcomm AI accelerator platforms (AI200/AI250 family and future roadmap), targeting OCP Open Rack and 19" EIA form factors.
- Lead system-level design trade-offs spanning power delivery (48V DC busbar, rack PDU), cooling architecture, signal integrity, and mechanical integration.
...
- Architect and oversee direct liquid cooling (DLC) systems including CDU sizing (e.g.,
...
138+ kW per rack), blind-mate manifolds (UQD/UQDB), cold plates, leak detection, and coolant loop design.
...
- Define rack power delivery architectures including 48V DC busbars, modular PSU shelves and VR/PMIC integration.
- Drive power budget analysis across full rack configurations (compute blades, switches, storage, CDU) and ensure PUE/efficiency targets are met.
...
- Lead rack-scale interconnect strategy encompassing CXL, UALink, PCIe Gen 6, and 800G/1.6T Ethernet switching fabrics (scale-up and scale-out).
- Own signal integrity requirements for high-performance PCB materials and rack-level cabling (copper and optical), including material trade-off analysis.
...
- Define and drive BMC/RMC architecture for OOB management, Redfish/IPMI compliance, telemetry, and health monitoring.
- Ensure DC-SCM 2.0 integration and multi-generation firmware roadmap aligned with OCP standards.
...
- Lead technical engagement with ODM/OEM partners for rack-level NRE, design validation, manufacturing, and qualification.
...
- Partner with hyperscaler customers and CSPs to align
...
solutions to datacenter facility and operational requirements
...
- 20+ years of experience in hardware engineering, with at least 5 years in a senior leadership role (Director or above).
- Proven track record of delivering rack-scale or full-system hardware platforms for cloud/data center markets.
...
- Deep expertise in OCP Open Rack v3 (ORv3) standards, OCP DC-MHS, DC-SCM, and related specifications.
...
- Hands-on experience with direct liquid cooling (DLC) system design and thermal architecture at the rack level.
...
- Strong background in high-speed digital design (PCIe Gen5/6, CXL, UALink, Ethernet 400G/800G) and signal integrity.
...
- Experience with rack-level power architecture including 48V DC distribution, VR/PMIC design, and efficiency optimization.
...
- Familiarity with BMC/RMC platforms, Redfish API, IPMI, and OCP management stack.
...
- Bachelor's degree in Science, Engineering, or related field and 10+ years of ASIC design, verification, validation, integration, or related work experience. ORMaster's degree in Science, Engineering, or related field and 9+ years of ASIC design, verification, validation, integration, or related work experience. results.title: Modem System Test Engineer -  6G/5G Data and Networking at Qualcomm | Jeremy
highlights:
Modem System Test Engineer - 6G/5G Data and Networking at Qualcomm | Jeremy
...
# Modem System Test Engineer - 6G/5G Data and Networking
...
System-level test engineer validating 6G/5G modem features, data protocols, and network performance across mobile, automotive, IoT, and broadband platforms at Qualcomm's San Diego headquarters.
...
Python C++ Java Linux C Shell Windows Unix PHP Algorithms Data Structures OOP
...
Qualcomm is a global leader in wireless technology, driving breakthroughs that enable advanced connectivity across mobile, automotive, IoT, compute, and next-generation connected experiences. The Modem System Test team plays a critical role in validating modem features, network behavior, and data performance across Qualcomm’s industry-leading modem platforms. We are seeking a motivated engineer to join the Modem System Test (MST) team in San Diego. In this role, you will contribute to building and validating end-to-end data features, protocols, and system performance across mobile, automotive, IoT, broadband platforms supporting 6G/5G modem, WiFi 7/8, ethernet and related data technologies. You will work across layers of the protocol stack and collaborate closely with cross-functional Software, Systems and Hardware teams to ensure high-quality product readiness for global deployment.
...
The ideal candidate is curious about emerging technologies, eager to learn, and comfortable working in a collaborative technical environment. Strong communication and interpersonal skills are essential, along with a proactive, hands-on approach to testing and lab-based work.
...
You will be responsible for validating end-to-end functionality and system level performance for modem networking and data protocol features. Core responsibilities include:
...
- Develop and execute system-level test strategies, methodologies, and test plans for data features and use cases.
...
- Define key data performance indicators and evaluate system performance, including CPU/NPU performance towards close-end Edge-AI models, and optimize based on data from conducted, radiated, and live 6G/5G network testing.
...
- Analyze 3GPP specifications, carrier requirements and customer specifications, translating them into robust validation scenarios and test coverage.
...
- Perform log analysis, debugging, and root cause investigation of failures across lab and field environments.
...
- Support feature integration, certification, and commercial
...
of global products.
...
- Strong understanding
...
wireline, Ethernet, and wireless data protocols, including RLP, PPP, TCP/UDP, IPv4/IPv6, DHCP
...
AT, VLAN, and
...
802.11ac/ax/ad.
...
- Familiarity with software engineering fundamentals, including data structures, embedded operating systems, object-oriented programming, and core algorithms.
...
- Exposure to air-interface performance analysis, TCP/IP analysis, packet tracing tools, protocol debugging, and system optimization.
...
- Programming or scripting experience in one or more languages such as C, C++, Java, Python, or shell scripting on UNIX/Linux/Windows platforms.
...
- Knowledge of AI/ML concepts and their application to digital communications is a plus.
...
### Modem HW Design Verification Engineer – AI Driven Next Gen Modem Hardware Development
...

Staff Engineer at [Qualcomm](https://www.linkedin.com/company/qualcomm)
...
I am an experienced Staff Engineer with a background in AI/ML, specializing in deep learning model design, development, and deployment. Currently at Qualcomm, I have led AI initiatives in the XR/VR research domain, reading research papers, and developing advanced models from MobileNet, Efficient net and ResNet families, along with optimizing them for mobile chipsets. My work emphasizes delivering precise AI solutions, particularly in semantic segmentation, where I expanded model capabilities, improving semantic reconstruction for 3D applications. In addition to AI model development, I have experience translating customer requirements into technical tasks, managing global teams, and driving projects through agile methodologies such as Jira and Scrum. My skills include hands-on expertise in building and fine-tuning Language Models (RNNs, LSTM, WaveNet, and recently LLMs) and working with frameworks such as Langchain and Hugging Face, and Gemini Pro. I hold a Master’s degree in Computer Science, with a specialization in Data Science from the University of North Carolina. My coursework focused on building foundational deep learning models, generative models like GANs and autoregressive models RNNs and LSTMs from scratch, and scaling machine learning models on Spark for distributed execution. I have also served as a research assistant in software design and testing, further sharpening my technical project management skills.

results.title: Aditi Rao S
highlights:
Embedded AI @ Qualcomm | MS Research @ IIT Indore | S2S Indian Patent holder, ex-Samsung.
...
Machine Learning Engineer at [Qualcomm](https://www.linkedin.com/company/qualcomm)
...
My career began in firmware engineering, where I worked on embedded storage systems at Western Digital and later as a Senior Engineer at Samsung Semiconductor. During this time, I focused on optimizing firmware pipelines and improving system reliability for SSDs used in consumer and automotive devices. Over time, my curiosity about how intelligence could be built into these systems led me to pursue an MS Research in Computer Science at IIT Indore. My research focused on speech representation learning, resulting in the development of a self-supervised training framework. This work earned a granted Indian patent and a paper currently under review at an SCI-indexed journal. I have also worked on making AI deployment of large language models more efficient on edge devices using quantization and LoRA. I enjoy working at the intersection of machine learning and systems engineering where algorithms meet real-world constraints. I am passionate about solving problems that combine analytical depth, engineering precision, and practical impact. I am currently open to industry roles in machine learning, AI optimization, or AI development. I’m eager to connect and contribute to teams pushing the boundaries of applied AI and intelligent systems.

...
A driven software engineer specializing in advanced AI solutions, bringing rigorous programming skills and solid expertise across software design, development, artificial intelligence (AI), natural language processing (NLP), large language models (LLMs), Agentic AI, Generative AI, and Computer Vision. My experience spans designing, building, and optimizing advanced AI inference frameworks and neural network solutions for real-world applications. At Qualcomm, I develop and optimize innovative on-device LLM inference solutions in C++. My responsibilities encompass developing and integrating new features for on-device AI inferencing, enhancing model customization, and optimizing performance through techniques like speculative decoding and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). I also contribute to AI agent frameworks and consistently resolve complex technical challenges in collaboration with global teams, with a proven track record of delivering high-quality solutions on schedule. I pursued an Integrated Master's degree in Computer Science Engineering at IIIT Bangalore and graduated in July 2023. Over the course of my studies, I have also worked on funded projects and research problems in the fields of computer science, healthcare, and astrophysics. Thus, developing the ability to work well with others, handle stress, produce high-quality work on schedule, and adjust to various requirements. I look forward to connecting with you! You can contact me at suchithkumar.ch@gmail.com.
